news.title:
RailTel wins ₹29.7 Cr Jharkhand govt order to set up English labs by 2029.
RailTel shares closed at ₹245.95, near 52-week low; market cap at ₹7,893 Cr.
news.summary:
RailTel wins ₹29.7 Cr Jharkhand govt order to set up English labs by 2029.
RailTel shares closed at ₹245.95, near 52-week low; market cap at ₹7,893 Cr.

news.title: RailTel Corp of India Ltd received an order worth Rs 296.9M.
news.summary: RailTel Corp of India Ltd received an order worth Rs 296.9M.

news.title:
Railtel Corp secures ₹13.04 Cr deal with Mumbai Port Authority for HMIS SITC.
The 5-year contract includes execution until July 2026 and O&M services.
news.summary:
Railtel Corp secures ₹13.04 Cr deal with Mumbai Port Authority for HMIS SITC.
The 5-year contract includes execution until July 2026 and O&M services.

news.title:
RailTel Corp received LoA from Mumbai Port Authority for HMIS project.
The project spans 5 years from the Go-Live date for hospitals and dispensaries.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp received LoA from Mumbai Port Authority for HMIS project.
The project spans 5 years from the Go-Live date for hospitals and dispensaries.

news.title:
RailTel Corporation of India Ltd. secured an order worth Rs. 44.4 Cr from Centre for E-Governance.
The contract involves system integration for KSWAN 3.0, to be executed by March 2031.
news.summary:
RailTel Corporation of India Ltd. secured an order worth Rs. 44.4 Cr from Centre for E-Governance.
The contract involves system integration for KSWAN 3.0, to be executed by March 2031.

news.title:
RailTel to hold an Investor Meet in Mumbai on March 30, 2026, sharing its investor presentation.
No unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed; presentation available on RailTel's website.
news.summary:
RailTel to hold an Investor Meet in Mumbai on March 30, 2026, sharing its investor presentation.
No unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed; presentation available on RailTel's website.

news.title:
RailTel wins ₹29.48 crore SD-WAN contract from MP State Crime Records Bureau, to be executed by March 2029.
RailTel also secured a ₹42.63 crore NICSI contract under NKN project, to be completed by March 2027.
news.summary:
RailTel wins ₹29.48 crore SD-WAN contract from MP State Crime Records Bureau, to be executed by March 2029.
RailTel also secured a ₹42.63 crore NICSI contract under NKN project, to be completed by March 2027.

news.title: Railtel Corporation secured a ₹294.9M work order.
news.summary: Railtel Corporation secured a ₹294.9M work order.

news.title:
RailTel Corp received a work order from State Crime Records Bureau, Bhopal.
The order is for SITC of SDWAN and 3-year support, execution by 24 Mar 2029.
news.summary:

news.title:
RailTel Corp received an order from East Coast Railway for manpower outsourcing.
The 2-year project in Khurda Road Division is to be completed by 18 Mar 2028.

news.title:
RailTel Corporation secures Rs. 159.8 crore order from Prasar Bharati for SITC services.
The project involves cloud-based integrated newsroom services for Doordarshan, to be completed by Mar 2029.
news.summary:

news.title:
Railtel secures ₹168.75 cr Bihar Education Project to enhance school education.
The project is slated for completion by September 30, 2026.

news.title:
RailTel wins ₹48.4 Cr contract from North Bihar Power for cybersecurity centre.
Project to be completed by January 17, 2027, enhancing RailTel's portfolio.

news.title:
RailTel secures ₹42.6 crore order from NICSI for NKN project, set to complete by March 2027.
GAIL signs MoU with RailTel for digital infrastructure collaboration, focusing on AI and connectivity initiatives.

news.title:
RailTel Corp received a work order from NICSI for a New Core Link under NKN Project for 12 months.
The project is set for completion by 31 Mar 2027, focusing on domestic telecom services.

news.title:
Railtel gets orders worth ₹64 cr; stock to watch today.
Newgen Software wins ₹20.5 cr Kuwait order; Nippon AMC to sell 40% AIF stake for ₹734 cr.

Project includes Automatic Block Signaling, completion by Sep 4, 2027.

news.title:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.
news.summary:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.
